_comment: Active splash animation set + render params. Single source of truth for the pipeline (make_wrappers.py -> capture_frames.mjs -> frames_to_data.py -> gen_splash_header.py). 'group' is the authoritative rate-bucket tier — one of "idle", "normal", "active", "heavy" (matching the usage-rate tiers in firmware/src/usage_rate.cpp). It is propagated through manifest.json into splash_anim_def_t.group in the generated header; splash.cpp maps it to a rate-group index via RATE_TIERS. Source SVGs vendored in ./svg/ (MIT, marciogranzotto/clawd-tank). Optional per-animation fields: 'start_ms' (default 0) offsets the capture window into the CSS timeline so a clip can begin further into a long animation (e.g. builder starts at its sweat phase); 'bbox_strip' (list of CSS class names) removes elements from the tight-viewBox probe only — cairosvg ignores class 'opacity: 0', so decorative overlays hidden at rest (e.g. the wizard's flying magic stars) otherwise inflate the bbox and shrink the framed creature; 'y_offset' (user units, positive = down) lowers the viewBox origin to drop the framed creature without rescaling, used to line a clip's baseline up with the rest of the set.
